diagrams.title: Cloud Security Architecture Layers
diagrams.description: Shows the layered approach to security in cloud environments with each layer's components and responsibilities
diagrams.purpose: Understanding defense in depth and where different security controls fit in cloud architecture

diagrams.title: VPC Network Architecture
diagrams.description: Typical three-tier VPC architecture with public and private subnets, showing traffic flow and security controls
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing proper network segmentation and how traffic flows securely between layers

diagrams.title: Security Group vs NACL Flow
diagrams.description: Comparison of how Security Groups (instance-level, stateful) and NACLs (subnet-level, stateless) process traffic
elements: Incoming request → NACL (subnet level) → Security Group (instance level) → Instance
Outgoing response → Security Group → NACL → Destination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the order of evaluation and difference between stateful and stateless filtering
